languages.original_text: {n}Silence reigns, and then it is broken by the xenos's gratified laughter.{/n} "Well done, human — your ability to draw conclusions from experience does you credit."

languages.text: {n}Повисает тишина — которую нарушает довольный смех ксеноса.{/n} "Похвально, человек — твоя способность делать выводы из полученного опыта делает тебе честь".
{n}Silence reigns, and then it is broken by the xenos's gratified laughter.{/n} "Well done, human — your ability to draw conclusions from experience does you credit."
languages.original_text: {n}Повисает тишина — которую нарушает довольный смех ксеноса.{/n} "Похвально, человек — твоя способность делать выводы из полученного опыта делает тебе честь".

traits.locale_text: {n}Silence reigns, and then it is broken by the xenos's gratified laughter.{/n} "Well done, human — your ability to draw conclusions from experience does you credit."
{n}Silence reigns, and then it is broken by the xenos's gratified laughter.{/n} "Well done, human — your ability to draw conclusions from experience does you credit."
{n}Silence reigns, and then it is broken by the xenos's gratified laughter.{/n} "Well done, human — your ability to draw conclusions from experience does you credit."

languages.text: {n}Se hace el silencio, roto después por la risa satisfecha del xenos.{/n} «Bien hecho, human{mf|o|a}: tu capacidad de sacar conclusiones de la experiencia es loable».
languages.original_text: {n}Silence reigns, and then it is broken by the xenos's gratified laughter.{/n} "Well done, human — your ability to draw conclusions from experience does you credit."

traits.locale_text: {n}Se hace el silencio, roto después por la risa satisfecha del xenos.{/n} «Bien hecho, human{mf|o|a}: tu capacidad de sacar conclusiones de la experiencia es loable».

languages.text: {n}场面一度安静下来，随后被异形满意的笑声打破。{/n}“干得好，人类。你从经验中吸取教训的能力，值得称赞。”
languages.original_text: {n}Silence reigns, and then it is broken by the xenos's gratified laughter.{/n} "Well done, human — your ability to draw conclusions from experience does you credit."

traits.locale_text: {n}场面一度安静下来，随后被异形满意的笑声打破。{/n}“干得好，人类。你从经验中吸取教训的能力，值得称赞。”

languages.text: {n}Le silence qui s'ensuit est rompu peu après par le rire satisfait du xénos.{/n} « Bravo, {mf|humain|humaine}, vous êtes capable de tirer des conclusions de votre expérience. C'est tout à votre honneur. »
languages.original_text: {n}Silence reigns, and then it is broken by the xenos's gratified laughter.{/n} "Well done, human — your ability to draw conclusions from experience does you credit."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le silence qui s'ensuit est rompu peu après par le rire satisfait du xénos.{/n} « Bravo, {mf|humain|humaine}, vous êtes capable de tirer des conclusions de votre expérience. C'est tout à votre honneur. »

languages.text: {n}Ortama hâkim olan sessizlik, zenonun memnuniyet dolu kahkahasıyla bozuluyor.{/n} "Aferin insan. Deneyimlerinden sonuç çıkarma yeteneğin seni yüceltiyor."
languages.original_text: {n}Silence reigns, and then it is broken by the xenos's gratified laughter.{/n} "Well done, human — your ability to draw conclusions from experience does you credit."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ortama hâkim olan sessizlik, zenonun memnuniyet dolu kahkahasıyla bozuluyor.{/n} "Aferin insan. Deneyimlerinden sonuç çıkarma yeteneğin seni yüceltiyor."

languages.text: {n}Die nun eintretende Stille wird schließlich vom zufriedenen Lachen des Xenos durchbrochen.{/n} "Gut gemacht, Mensch — deine Fähigkeit, aus Erfahrungen Schlüsse zu ziehen, ehrt dich."
languages.original_text: {n}Silence reigns, and then it is broken by the xenos's gratified laughter.{/n} "Well done, human — your ability to draw conclusions from experience does you credit."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die nun eintretende Stille wird schließlich vom zufriedenen Lachen des Xenos durchbrochen.{/n} "Gut gemacht, Mensch — deine Fähigkeit, aus Erfahrungen Schlüsse zu ziehen, ehrt dich."

languages.text: {n}静寂が支配していたが、その静寂を破ったのは、異形の者の満足げな笑い声だった。{/n}「よくやった、人間。経験から結論を導き出す能力は、君を称賛するものである。」
languages.original_text: {n}Silence reigns, and then it is broken by the xenos's gratified laughter.{/n} "Well done, human — your ability to draw conclusions from experience does you credit."

traits.locale_text: {n}静寂が支配していたが、その静寂を破ったのは、異形の者の満足げな笑い声だった。{/n}「よくやった、人間。経験から結論を導き出す能力は、君を称賛するものである。」
